source: Synthetic cold call transcript based on common rejection patterns
summary: Commercial solar cold call where the prospect quickly rejects the offer and asks to be removed from the call list.

turns.speaker: Northbridge Foods
turns.text: Hi. Hello, Northbridge. Who's calling, please?

turns.speaker: Alex Morgan
turns.text: Hi. Can I speak with Peter Morgan? This is Alex. I've been trying to reach him by email. Do you know when he's back or available?

turns.speaker: Northbridge Foods
turns.text: You talked about email, did you say? About what? Sorry. Oh, with no interest. I mean, no requirement for it, but I'm the managing director, so you can take us off your call list.

turns.speaker: Alex Morgan
turns.text: That through email about some solar. About solar for the company. Do you have solar or okay. So I'm not trying to sell solar. I'm just, like, we basically have you heard of PPA?

turns.speaker: Northbridge Foods
turns.text: As I said, you have no use for me. I have absolutely no use for it whatsoever. No. I see. You're wasting your time. Thanks for calling anyway. Cheers.
